suspects.name: Martin Hale
suspects.statement: I wrapped the cracked mug handle with blue tape, left it beside the desk and went at 20:05.
suspects.alibi_claim: I repaired the mug handle and left the room at 20:05.
suspects.alibi_evidence_fact: The mug's cracked handle is freshly wrapped in blue tape exactly as Martin described, corroborating the specific task he said he completed before leaving.

suspects.name: Lydia Grant
suspects.statement: I stepped out for some air and did not return.
suspects.alibi_claim: I left the room at 20:00 and did not return.
suspects.alibi_evidence_fact: The monitor's visible revision history shows the speaker's local account made a keyboard edit at 20:13, proving they were at the desk after 20:00.

suspects.name: Jasper Liu
suspects.statement: I sorted the reports into two piles and left the red folder face-down before leaving.
suspects.alibi_claim: I was organising papers at the desk until 20:08, then left.
suspects.alibi_evidence_fact: The desk contains two neat paper piles with the red folder face-down, matching Jasper's unusually specific description of how he left it.
